ddls:
CREATE TABLE "molecules" (
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each molecule */,
  "mol_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "alogp" REAL /* AlogP value (logarithm of the partition coefficient between octanol and water) */,
  "psa" REAL /* Polar surface area (PSA) of the molecule */,
  "hba" INTEGER /* Number of hydrogen bond acceptors (HBA) */,
  "hbd" INTEGER /* Number of hydrogen bond donors (HBD) */,
  "qed_weighted" REAL /* Quantitative estimate of drug-likeness (QED_Weighted) */,
  "arom_rings" INTEGER /* Number of aromatic rings in the molecule */,
  "mol_species" INTEGER /* Molecular species identifier */,
  "smiles" TEXT /* Simplified molecular-input line-entry system (SMILES) notation of the molecule */,
  "synonyms" TEXT /* List of synonyms for the molecule */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* CAS (Chemical Abstracts Service) number of the molecule */,
  "inchi_key" TEXT /* InChI (International Chemical Identifier) key of the molecule */,
  "pubchem_cid" INTEGER /* PubChem CID of the molecule */,
  "molecule_name" TEXT /* Common name of the molecule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("molecule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecules_mol_species FOREIGN KEY ("mol_species") REFERENCES molecular_species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "molecular_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each molecular species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the molecular species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the molecular species */,
  "species_type" TEXT /* Type of molecular species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the molecular species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, chemist, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  "last_accessed_molecule" INTEGER /* Last molecule accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecule being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the molecule */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the molecule was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY ("molecule_id") REFERENCES molecules ("molecule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "molecule_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecule associated with the property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecule_properties_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY ("molecule_id") REFERENCES molecules ("molecule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "molecule_similarity" (
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similarity entry */,
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecule being compared */,
  "similar_molecule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the similar molecule */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score between the molecules */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecule_similarity_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY ("molecule_id") REFERENCES molecules ("molecule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecule_similarity_similar_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY ("similar_molecule_id") REFERENCES molecules ("molecule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Binary data of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
column_names: AlogP value (logarithm of the partition coefficient between octanol and water)
